agent: Wave N7a — seed real USDC/EURC LP into TGH-hooked pool

router.note: Canonical Uniswap v4 PoolModifyLiquidityTest from lib/v4-core/src/test/. Bytecode mirrored at scripts/artifacts/PoolModifyLiquidityTest.json (sha256 reproducible from the fx-telarana forge build with foundry.toml's via_ir + cancun config). Deployed fresh in this tx — single-purpose v4 LP router for the keeper's modifyLiquidity calls. Owns the position (positions[keccak(router,tickLower,tickUpper,salt)]) per PoolModifyLiquidityTest's unlockCallback convention (`address(this)` is the owner field in modifyLiquidity).

liquiditySeed.notes: L sized via getLiquidityForAmount0 with amount0=1 USDC at sqrtRatio range (tick -917 → tick -817). Because current sqrtPriceX96 is at MAX (price-lock from N6 zero-LP swap), the position lies entirely BELOW the current price → realised single-sided in token1 (EURC), not balanced. ~0.917 EURC consumed; mirrors the brief's 0.9 EURC target. A future USDC→EURC swap (zeroForOne=true, price drops) will cross into [TICK_LOWER, TICK_UPPER] and consume this EURC against real AMM math. Balanced 1 USDC + 0.9 EURC seed cannot be added to THIS specific pool until sqrtPriceX96 is restored — see blocker + recommendedFollowup.

balanceDeltas._note: keeper.usdc delta is gas-only — modifyLiquidity, deploy, and the two approves all paid gas in native USDC. keeper.eurc delta of -0.916957 is the LP deposit (single-sided in token1 because current sqrtPriceX96 sits above the LP range).

slot0After._note: tick unchanged — modifyLiquidity does not move price. Pool remains price-locked at MAX_TICK from the N6 zero-LP swap.

globalLiquidityNote: PoolManager Pool.State slot+3 (`liquidity`) tracks GLOBAL active in-range liquidity. Our position range [-917,-817] is BELOW current tick (887271), so the position is INACTIVE — not counted in global liquidity. Verified per-position via extsload at positions[keccak(router=0x10a2…84e, tickLower=-917, tickUpper=-817, salt=0)] which returns liquidity=191525027 (= 0x0b6a70a3) — confirming LP was added to the pool's position store.

steps.detail: PoolModifyLiquidityTest deployed at 0x10a2eea3db2a4549f9cc3ac5aeaea4ac924b184e, manager() pinned to 0x3FA22b7Aeda9ebBe34732ea394f1711887363B34
USDC.approve(0x10a2eea3db2a4549f9cc3ac5aeaea4ac924b184e, max) — was 0. Defence-in-depth approval; actual position is single-sided EURC, so no USDC was pulled.
EURC.approve(0x10a2eea3db2a4549f9cc3ac5aeaea4ac924b184e, max) — was 0. Required because the position lies above current price → realised in token1 (EURC).

modifyLiquidity(poolKey, {tickLower=-917, tickUpper=-817, liquidityDelta=191525027, salt=0}, hookData=0x). Hook callback NOT invoked because TGH.getHookPermissions() returns beforeAddLiquidity=false, afterAddLiquidity=false — PoolManager skips the hook entirely. Position recorded in PoolManager.positions mapping, balance delta paid in EURC (single-sided).

outcome.evidence: tx 0x7b2ef8bbfea164821f1dfecd06a3717e86760a3c7be9f661cb86b6e4323c42ab (status=success, gas=240673, block=43523924) — PoolManager.modifyLiquidity executed against poolId 0xf6b13fe5…7f711. Keeper EURC delta -0.916957 (LP deposit, single-sided), USDC delta -0.027562 (gas only). Position.liquidity at positions[keccak(0x10a2…84e, -917, -817, 0x0)] = 191525027 — confirmed real LP recorded via PoolManager.extsload. Slot0 tick unchanged at 887271 (modifyLiquidity does not move price). The TGH hook was NOT invoked during LP add (per getHookPermissions={beforeAddLiquidity:false, afterAddLiquidity:false}), which is the correct v4 behaviour.
outcome.blocker: Pool sqrtPriceX96 is at MAX_SQRT_PRICE-1 (tick 887271) from the N6 zero-LP swap. Any EURC→USDC swap (the N6 demo direction) reverts with PriceLimitAlreadyExceeded because the price cannot go higher. This LP seed enables ONLY the USDC→EURC direction — N6's Demo B swap path remains unable to consume LP via AMM math on THIS pool. The TGH Gateway intra-hook USDC mint path still works (it doesn't depend on LP), but the user's input-side EURC settlement still bypasses LP because the swap's price walk is blocked at MAX.
outcome.readyForProductionSwapAgainstRealLP: NO — not for the N6 Demo B EURC→USDC direction. YES — for the inverse USDC→EURC direction, the seeded ~0.917 EURC is consumable against AMM math at tickUpper=-817 down to tickLower=-917.
outcome.recommendedFollowup: Initialize a sibling TGH-hooked pool with a different fee tier (e.g. fee=500 or fee=3000) at fresh sqrtPriceX96=0xf52559aa0006380000000000 (tick -867, price 0.917 EURC/USDC). With a freshly-initialized price, balanced 1 USDC + 0.9 EURC LP can be seeded across [-917,-817] and BOTH swap directions will consume real AMM math against LP. This is Wave N7-followup item (N7b).
